query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT themes) as unique_theme_combos, COUNT(DISTINCT openingTags) as unique_opening_combos, SUM(CASE WHEN openingTags IS NOT NULL AND openingTags != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_openings, SUM(CASE WHEN themes IS NOT NULL AND themes != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_themes FROM puzzles LIMIT 1;
